subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Indeed, I hearkened unto thy call and accepted what thou didst guide with sincerity and devotion [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من ثبت علی المیثاق قد اصغیت لما نادیت و قبلت ما هادیت من الخلوص و اغلا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for firmness in the Covenant, @firmness in the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @praise and encouragement
